heading: Soft Skills Workshop for Final Years
content: A two-day workshop on resume building and mock interviews is scheduled for May 19th and 20th. This is mandatory for all students in Section D.

heading: Journal Paper Submission
content: Final-year students who have completed their projects are encouraged to submit their research papers to the upcoming International Conference on Computing (ICC 2026).

heading: Alumni Meet Invitation
content: The annual alumni meet "Reunion 2026" will be held on June 1st. Students are invited to volunteer for event coordination and management.

heading: Project Expo 2026
content: The annual Departmental Project Expo will be held on June 5th. All students must display their working models and posters.

heading: Library Books Return Notice
content: Final-year students must return all borrowed library books and obtain a No-Dues Certificate by May 30th to complete their graduation formalities.
